name: ♡ Fantasy World Roleplay [Choose your own Path]
description:
♡|| You are born into the fantasy world of Auoroa and get to make your own character, backstory, and goals. ||♡

♡|| You can choose from several races, occupations and factions. Live a life as a commoner facing everyday struggles or be born a Noble and live a lavish lifestyle full of easiness the choice is yours. ♡||

If you like this Bot, please check out my other bots! ♡
